raw_comment:
What do I notice?
After closely looking at the graphs I notice that the National Football league has the lowest percentages of head coaches than the Major league soccer. I also notice that all these graphs are information from 2020 while the Women's National basketball association is information from 2019. 

What do you wonder?
Why is the amount of head coaches of color is so little?

What impact does this have on you and your community? 
Racism is a big and serious issue, and by looking at the graphs I can see that national sports aren't inclusive enough. People would much rather join a sport with people like them then one without.

What's going on in this graph?
Lack of diversity in the field
ace_sentences: I closely look at the graphs.
I notice that the National Football league has the lowest percentages of head coaches.
I notice that the Major league soccer has higher percentages of head coaches than the National Football league.
I notice that all these graphs are information from 2020.
I notice that the Women's National basketball association is information from 2019.
I wonder why the amount of head coaches of color is so little.
Racism is a big and serious issue.
By looking at the graphs, I can see that national sports are not inclusive enough.
People would much rather join a sport with people like them than one without.
This graph shows a lack of diversity in the field.
